name: Shepherd's Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 16 oz. package of mixed frozen vegetables (corn, green beans, carrots, or any other variety)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large saute pan or skillet, add ground beef, onion, celery, and garlic; cook over medium heat until meat is browned. Drain liquid. Do not return to heat.
3. Stir in tomato sauce, vegetables, bay leaves, thyme, marjoram, and black pepper.
4. For mashed potatoes: Boil potatoes over high heat until soft; drain. Add butter and gradually add milk while mashing potatoes with an electric mixer or hand masher. The consistency of mashed potatoes should be firm. Do not make the potatoes too runny. Set aside.
5. Transfer meat and vegetable mixture to a 2-2 1/2-quart casserole. Evenly top with mashed potatoes. Sprinkle with paprika. Cover and bake for 20 minutes or until potatoes are lightly browned.
